scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @douban-lite/api" "npm run dev --workspace @douban-lite/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @douban-lite/shared && npm run build --workspace @douban-lite/api && npm run build --workspace @douban-lite/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @douban-lite/shared && npm run test --workspace @douban-lite/api && npm run test --workspace @douban-lite/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @douban-lite/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @douban-lite/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @douban-lite/web
